label: capability search • method • currency conversion recall
notes: Recall on a money-conversion intent where the query uses concrete currencies (dollars/euros) and the method description uses the general term (currency / exchange rates). The verb `convert` is the shared anchor; pins that a concrete-value query still bridges to the generalized capability.

seedMethods.name: convert_currency
seedMethods.description: Convert an amount of money from one currency to another at current exchange rates
